name: 李鎮宇
objective:
This course introduces the methods essential to business research. The first focus is on research methods, particularly applied quantitative statistical analysis—interpreting results, as well as applying them to actual data. Students should become informed consumers of statistics—to be able to understand and assess the quality of statistical methods in the papers they read, and to use those methods in their research. The second focus is on research design and data collection methods, which will be essential to master’s dissertation, and practical business roles (such as consultant or market researcher). Students will participate in a project in which they have the chance to collect and analyze their data.

The course is on fundamentals, up to multiple regression, so we will not have time to discuss more advanced statistical techniques. However, you should leave this class with a solid foundation for further education on these topics.
schedule:
1 Understanding Research
2 Dealing with practical issues
3 Research paradigm & designs
4 Literature review
5 Research proposal
6 Qualitative analysis
7 Statistics Review 1(Numerical summaries, Contingency, Confidence intervals, significance testing)
8 Statistics Review 2(Comparing 2 groups, association between categorical variables)
9 Exam Week
10 Regression Analysis (Correlation, multiple regression, mediation, moderation, logistic regression)
11 Experimental Research
12 Collecting data for statistical analysis
13 Questionnaire design
14 Writing your dissertation or thesis
15 Data collection in class
16 Publishing your research
17 Group Presentations
18 Exam Week
scorePolicy:
30% Participation, homework, quizzes
20% Midterm
20% Assignment 1: Research question
10% Questionnaire design
10% Report
10% Report (Q&A & revision)
100% Total
materials:
TEXTBOOK
“Business Research: A Practical Guide for Students”  5th Edition
Authors: Jill Collins, Roger Hussey
https://holding.lib.ntut.edu.tw/bookDetail/588059

REFERENCE
Research methods : the basics / Nicholas Walliman.
https://holding.lib.ntut.edu.tw/bookDetail/588061
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG8：尊嚴就業與經濟發展（Decent Work and Economic Growth）
課程是否導入AI: ● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）● 簡單介紹 AI 的基本概念（Briefly introduce the basic concept of AI）
